name: Bungee Jumping Stockhorn
description: Discover Bungee Jumping Stockhorn in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Bungee Jumping Stockhorn in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Bungee jumping
subcategory.description: Experience the special kick and book your next bungee jump here. For adrenaline junkies there are many opportunities for bungee jumping in Switzerland. There is even a jumping location that became world famous through the 007 movie "GoldenEye": the dam in the Verzasca Valley in the south of Switzerland. Here you jump from a 220-meter-high dam wall. This is the third highest bungee jump in the world.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
